# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

```yaml
parameters:
    location: 'eastus' # Choose your preferred Azure region here e.g., eastus, westeurope etc..
	vmNamePrefix: ''  	# Provide a prefix for VMs if required (optional). Default is empty string 
	sasUriExpiryTimeInMinutes : 720    # Expiration time in minutes of the SAS URI e.g., '1440' means that there will be one hour before expiring, default value would also work for most cases but you might need to adjust based on your requirements
	resourceGroupName: ''  	# Provide a resource group if required (optional). Default is empty string 
	sasUriSecretName : 'MyServiceBusToken' # Name of the secret that will be used store SAS Token. default value would also work for most cases but you might need to adjust based on your requirements	
identityType: 'SystemAssigned'	# Type can either Be System Assigned or User Assigned (optional). Default is system assigned if not provided 
tags: # Add any tags here e.g., - key : value, tag1 : tagvalue1 etc...  
    location: ''    		      	        	       	 			         									     	   	     						                 	# Location for the resources like eastus or westeurope (optional). Default is empty string
